$comment: Repo-local kinox pipeline (governed-TUI spec, Piece 2). Any Claude Code session launched inside this repo runs the framework's OWN hooks, independent of the user's global ~/.claude/settings.json. The groom UserPromptSubmit hook grooms input (redact -> expand -> context -> tag, fuzzy tag offloaded to the broker); the dev-guard PreToolUse hook is a no-op unless KINOX_ROLE=developer. Both fail soft and never block. Commands resolve under $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR so the file is portable and committable.
